message: [typescript-best-practices] Never use 'any' type annotation → Let TypeScript infer, use 'unknown' with type guards, or use a proper type definition
[drizzle-best-practices] Using generic Error instead of TRPCError in router → Use throw new TRPCError({ code: 'NOT_FOUND', message: '...' })
[next-best-practices] Inline script missing id attribute → Add id: <script id="..." dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ ... }} />
[nextjs-app-router-patterns] Don't fetch in Client Components with useEffect → Use Server Components for data fetching, or React Query if client-side fetching is required
[typescript-best-practices] fetch .json() returns any → Validate with a type guard or Zod schema before using the data

[building-components] Use semantic HTML — lists should use
    /
  • not
    /

[vercel-react-best-practices] client-swr-dedup - Use SWR for automatic deduplication instead of raw fetch in useEffect → Replace useEffect+fetch with useSWR hook: const { data } = useSWR('/api/trpc/contacts.list', fetcher)
